expo.name: Gold – XAU/USD Tracker
expo.description: Track live gold prices and manage your physical gold portfolio. Real-time XAU/USD charts, gain/loss analytics, and camera photo capture for every bar and coin.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Gold Tracker uses your camera to photograph your gold bars and coins for your portfolio records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Gold Tracker accesses your photo library to add images of your gold holdings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Gold Tracker saves photos of your gold holdings to your library.

plugins.photosPermission: Gold Tracker accesses your photos to add images of your gold holdings.
plugins.cameraPermission: Gold Tracker uses your camera to photograph your gold bars and coins.
